name: @intentsolutionsio/claude-reflect
description: Self-learning system for Claude Code that captures corrections and updates CLAUDE.md automatically

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install claude-reflect\\n  or /plugin install claude-reflect@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
